name: Compass, Inc.
business: Compass, Inc. is a global real estate services company that operates an owned-brokerage business under brands like Compass, Coldwell Banker, Corcoran, and Sotheby's International Realty, and a franchise business under brands like Century 21 and ERA. It generates revenue primarily from sharing commissions from home sales and from franchise royalties. The company also provides integrated services such as title and escrow, and mortgage services via joint ventures.

exposures.sentence: We integrated the OpenAI application programming interface into our Compass platform.

catalysts.sentence: On January 9, 2026, we completed the merger contemplated by the Agreement and Plan of Merger with Anywhere Real Estate Inc.
